page_metadata.biotools__summary: Database which catalogs experimentally determined interactions between proteins. It combines information from a variety of sources to create a single, consistent set of protein-protein interactions. Search the database using a protein id.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Database which catalogs experimentally determined interactions between proteins. It combines information from a variety of sources to create a single, consistent set of protein-protein interactions. Search the database using a protein id.
